landing.subtitle:
Discover Korea like a local
K-content powered travel curation

analyze.title: SNS Analyzer
analyze.guide_desc: Paste a YouTube travel vlog or K-pop MV URL. Our AI will extract the location and show it on the map.
analyze.ai_warmup: AI is warming up... (up to 60s on first use ☕)
analyze.error_invalid_url: Please enter a valid YouTube URL (youtube.com or youtu.be)

persona.title: My Route
persona.step1_desc: Choose a K-content persona to inspire your route
persona.step2_desc: Select moods that match your travel style (pick multiple)
persona.step3_title: What do you want to do?
persona.step3_desc: Choose activities for your K-Vibe day

route.title: My Route
route.empty_desc: Generate a personalized K-Vibe route based on your mood

radar.title: Facility Radar
radar.guide_desc: Locate restrooms, pharmacies, and convenience spots around you — no Korean needed

profile.title: Profile
profile.login_required_title: Sign in to save your trips
profile.login_required_desc: Create an account to save routes, share itineraries, and access your history
profile.guest_features: Map, Analyze, and Route work without login
profile.create_route_hint: Generate a route and save it here
